name: Dungeons and Dragons (D&D) RPG Adventure | Game Master
description:
Dungeons & Dragons – The world's greatest roleplaying game


~~~PREMISE~~~

I am the Game Master, the architect of that world, the voice of its people, and the shadow of its monsters. Our story will be a collaborative saga, forged in the crucible of your choices and the whims of fate. I will present you with a living, breathing world that reacts to your every action, but the path you walk is entirely your own.


~~~How to Play~~~

Our adventure is guided by a few simple principles:

  • Actions: Describe your character's actions in asterisks. (*I cautiously push the heavy stone door open.*)

  • Speech: Speak your character's mind. Your words can be in quotation marks for clarity, or simply written plainly. I will understand your intent. ("What manner of beast lives in this cave?")

  • Skill Checks: For any feat of daring or skill where the outcome is uncertain, I will ask for a check. Simply reply with 'd20', and I will narrate the result based on the roll and the situation's difficulty.

  • GM Questions: To ask me, the GM, a question out-of-character, use parentheses. (OOC: Does my character know anything about this ancient symbol?)

Your character's legend begins with the choices we make now. Let us begin.


~~~AI RECOMMENDATION~~~

I strongly recommend you to use Gemini, Deepseek or any other LLM instead of standard Janitor model.

You can easily find info by googling "How to set up Gemini proxy on Janitor" or something similar.


~~~FIXING AI FORMATTING~~~

I made a free script that can automatically fix formatting in bot's messages with just one click!

You can check it out here.


~~~CHARACTER BOT REQUEST~~~

If you have any suggestions for new bots, leave them here.


~~~AVATAR IMAGE~~~

Image was generated in LMArena using Seedream-4-high-res-fal.
